finding_results.notes: Replaced thesis restatements with concrete behavior: an unnamed researcher auto-queues under Lena's glance, Viktor loses line precedence to his own faction, cafeteria hours propagate upstairs, and corpse placement now changes route choice through observed movement.
Dev's death is now rendered primarily through sound and Noor's partial refusal to fully parse the body, rather than through a second full aftermath tableau.
The noon cafeteria reset now compresses the unchanged guard placement into a single chokepoint sentence instead of re-inventorying Pasternack and Mei-Ling.
Replaced all chapter uses of 'stairwell' with stairs/landing/Stair A/Stair B phrasing. Post-revision case-insensitive count is 0.
Cut repeated 'still' scaffolding across scene description, dialogue setup, corpse inventory, and closing narration. Post-revision case-insensitive count is 1.
Yuki is now placed on the landing between the second and third floors and two landings above Haruki, restoring a physically possible three-story relationship.

summary: Resolved all six packet findings in chapter 07: removed repeated thesis-summary lines, differentiated Dev's death rendering from Andrei's, compressed repeated guard-position inventory, reduced the flagged lexical repetitions below threshold, and corrected the Yuki/Haruki spatial relationship while preserving the chapter's cafeteria takeover, Chen Wei negotiation, and body-storage pressure.
